text:
あ、<%me>！
ちょっといいかしら？

実はね、人から聞いたんだけど
東京エリアにも
不思議な石があるみたいなのよ！

話によると、青白く光る
小さな欠片みたいなのよね。

お守りに使えるかもしれないし
ちょっと、集めてきてくれ

Ah, <%me>!
Do you have a moment?
What am I saying? Of course you do.

Rumors have been swirling of late that
strange stones have been found in Tokyo.

Perhaps "pebbles" is a more fitting
descriptor. They're said to emit a
faint blue glow.

I though they might make for decent
good-luck charms if you could grab
me a handful.
